mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO stage_drop_statistics (id, stage_id, item_id, times, quantity, start_time, end_time, time_granularity, create_time, record_id, record_code) VALUES
(#{item.id},#{item.stageId},#{item.itemId},#{item.times}, #{item.quantity},#{item.startTime},#{item.endTime},#{item.timeGranularity},#{item.createTime},#{item.recordId},#{item.recordCode})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM stage_drop_statistics WHERE time_granularity = #{timeGranularity} AND start_time >= #{start} AND end_time <= #{end} ORDER BY start_time DESC
